summary: Compact sidebar, responsive dashboard, and breaking news auto-dismiss.

introduced: Sidebar size setting with Regular and Compact modes — Compact shows icons only to save horizontal space
changed: Minimum window size lowered to 920×680 so Nucleus fits better on smaller displays
Dashboard panels stack vertically when the content area is narrow, with tighter padding and spacing
Greeting text scales down slightly in compact dashboard layout
Breaking news overlay shows a 20-second countdown and auto-dismisses when no action is taken
fixed: Compact sidebar rows compile correctly in Release builds
